'''鈭歱-s-s''' ('''kapasas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ellisize|ellisize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ellisize|ellisize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-s-s
|-
! Lemma
| kapasas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipasas|thipasas]] || [[word:jipasas|jipasas]] || [[word:shipasas|shipasas]] || [[word:kipasas|kipasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupasas|thuthupasas]] || [[word:jujupasas|jujupasas]] || [[word:shushupasas|shushupasas]] || [[word:kukupasas|kukupasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupasas|thupasas]] || [[word:jupasas|jupasas]] || [[word:shupasas|shupasas]] || [[word:kupasas|kupasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupasas|thupasas]] || [[word:jupasas|jupasas]] || [[word:shupasas|shupasas]] || [[word:kupasas|kupasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepasas|thepasas]] || [[word:jepasas|jepasas]] || [[word:shepasas|shepasas]] || [[word:kepasas|kepasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopasas|thothopasas]] || [[word:jojopasas|jojopasas]] || [[word:shoshopasas|shoshopasas]] || [[word:kokopasas|kokopasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopasas|thopasas]] || [[word:jopasas|jopasas]] || [[word:shopasas|shopasas]] || [[word:kopasas|kopasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopasas|thopasas]] || [[word:jopasas|jopasas]] || [[word:shopasas|shopasas]] || [[word:kopasas|kopasas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]] || [[word:pasas|pasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pasas|th忙pasas]] || [[word:j忙pasas|j忙pasas]] || [[word:sh忙pasas|sh忙pasas]] || [[word:k忙pasas|k忙pasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapasas|thathapasas]] || [[word:jajapasas|jajapasas]] || [[word:shashapasas|shashapasas]] || [[word:kakapasas|kakapasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapasas|thapasas]] || [[word:japasas|japasas]] || [[word:shapasas|shapasas]] || [[word:kapasas|kapasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapasas|thapasas]] || [[word:japasas|japasas]] || [[word:shapasas|shapasas]] || [[word:kapasas|kapasas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapasas|shapasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapasas|goshapasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapasas|gokishapasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapasasn眉|shapasasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapasasnkn眉|goshapasasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasasn眉|gokishapasasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapasassh毛|shapasassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapasasnksh毛|goshapasasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapasassh毛|gokishapasassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasasro|shapasasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasasnkro|goshapasasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasasro|gokishapasasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasasmu|shapasasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasasnkmu|goshapasasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasasmu|gokishapasasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapasassher|shapasassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapasasnksher|goshapasasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapasassher|gokishapasassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapasasng|shapasasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapasasnkng|goshapasasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapasasng|gokishapasasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapasasya|shapasasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapasasnkya|goshapasasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapasasya|gokishapasasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapasasyam|shapasasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapasasnkyam|goshapasasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapasasyam|gokishapasasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasasn眉sh毛|shapasasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasasnkn眉sh毛|goshapasasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasasn眉sh毛|gokishapasasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasasn眉ro|shapasasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasasnkn眉ro|goshapasasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasasn眉ro|gokishapasasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasasn眉mu|shapasasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasasnkn眉mu|goshapasasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasasn眉mu|gokishapasasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasassh毛n眉|shapasassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasasnksh毛n眉|goshapasasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasassh毛n眉|gokishapasassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasassh毛ro|shapasassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasasnksh毛ro|goshapasasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasassh毛ro|gokishapasassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasassh毛mu|shapasassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasasnksh毛mu|goshapasasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasassh毛mu|gokishapasassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasasron眉|shapasasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasasnkron眉|goshapasasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasasron眉|gokishapasasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasasrosh毛|shapasasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasasnkrosh毛|goshapasasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasasrosh毛|gokishapasasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasasromu|shapasasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasasnkromu|goshapasasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasasromu|gokishapasasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasasmun眉|shapasasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasasnkmun眉|goshapasasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasasmun眉|gokishapasasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasasmush毛|shapasasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasasnkmush毛|goshapasasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasasmush毛|gokishapasasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasasmuro|shapasasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasasnkmuro|goshapasasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasasmuro|gokishapasasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
